title: Color Theme - Switching theme while Phone is set to Light Theme
scenario: Verify that switching between color themes (Follow Phone Theme, Light, Dark) applies immediately across all screens and persists after app restart, while re-selecting the active theme has no effect.
steps: 2. Open the app and ensure the theme is set to default (Follow Phone Theme).
3. Change the app theme to Dark.
4. Verify the Dark theme is applied immediately across all screens (e.g., DFU, User Guides, Device settings).
6. Confirm the Dark theme persists after app restart.
7. Change the app theme to Light.
8. Verify the Light theme is applied immediately across all screens.
10. Confirm the Light theme persists after app restart.
11. Re-select the currently active theme (e.g., if Light is active, select Light again).
12. Verify that re-selecting the active theme does nothing (no visual change).
expected: The selected theme is applied immediately across all screens and persists after app restart. Re-selecting the currently active theme results in no change.
